description_long: This object is a simple, straight-edged sword with a pointed tip and a flat, rectangular blade. The blade is metallic, dark gray in color, and shows some subtle surface marks or wear, suggesting use or age. The handle is a solid, dark brown, hexagonal or cylindrical grip, likely made of wood or a similar material, and is capped by a flat crossguard that separates it from the blade. The crossguard is minimal and functional, providing basic hand protection. The overall design is utilitarian, lacking any visible ornamentation or decorative features. Its proportions and construction suggest it is intended for practical use rather than display.
description: A straight, pointed sword with a dark metallic blade and a simple brown handle, separated by a flat crossguard. The design is plain and functional, with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight blade, pointed tip, and the flat crossguard with the brown handle clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, with the crossguard appearing as a thin line.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the straight blade, pointed tip, and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blade and handle, with minimal detail visible.
attribute_handle_design: straight, hexagonal or cylindrical, dark brown, plain, no visible grip texture
